# voyado Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Engage API key (`apikey` header).
- `api_url` (String) Base URL for the Engage HTTP API (for example `https://{tenant}.voyado.com` or `https://{tenant}.staging.voyado.com`). Paths such as `api/v3/...` are appended to this URL.

### Optional

- `user_agent` (String) Optional `User-Agent` header; Voyado recommends setting this for supportability.
